valiCATE 1.0.0
  • Short Tutorial
  • Reference

Correction Term for NCWATE

Source: R/correction.R
correction_ncwate.Rd

Computes the correction term C^gamma_hat_i for each observation, which enters the NCWATE influence function and accounts for the estimation error in the weight function.

correction_ncwate(Gamma, tau_hat, gamma_hat, wt_info, spec)

Arguments

Gamma

Numeric vector of AIPW pseudo-outcomes.

tau_hat

Numeric vector of CATE predictions.

gamma_hat

Scalar, the NCWATE point estimate.

wt_info

List from compute_weights with elements omega, v, and nabla.

spec

Weight specification from get_weight_spec.

Value

Numeric vector of correction terms C^gamma_hat_i.

Details

For CDF-based weights (AUTOC, AUC-HVL, QINI), the correction term involves a sum over all observations that is computed in O(n log n) via sorting and cumulative sums, rather than the naive O(n^2) double loop.

For BLP, the correction simplifies to an O(n) vectorized expression.

References

  • Di Francesco, R., & Knaus, M. C. (2025). Validating ML Predictions of Heterogeneous Treatment Effects via CWATE.

See also

correction_cwate, estimate_ncwate

Author

Riccardo Di Francesco
